title: Mega Man 2
edition_pinned: Row describes the 1988 NES design; genre evidence from live Steam Mega Man Legacy Collection (app 363440), which includes the original six Mega Man games, observed 2026-07-13.
moat: Boss-stolen weapons create rock-paper-scissors stage routing across eight selectable stages.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: One weapon-drop graph multiplies stage order and boss solutions without new verbs each stage.
exemplar_rationale: Classic stage-select action where stolen tools rewrite later encounters.

evidence.claim: Steam reported 5319 all-language, all-purchase user reviews for the Mega Man Legacy Collection listing (app 363440).
Steam appdetails genres field listed: Action.
